programme.title: No Way Up
programme.desc: Characters from different backgrounds are thrown together when the plane they're travelling on crashes into the Pacific Ocean. A nightmare fight for survival ensues with the air supply running out and dangers creeping in from all sides.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: A Special Forces Agent is assigned to protect a scientist and his creation from a sinister gang.

programme.title: The Perfect Weapon
programme.desc: In the not so distant future, society is controlled by the powerful State and a dictator known as the Director. Condor works as a hitman for the State, but a reunion with someone he thought was dead forces him to consider who his enemies really are.

programme.title: Breaking News in Yuba County
programme.desc: A woman takes advantage of her growing celebrity status when the police and the public think her dead husband is just missing.

programme.title: We Live in Time
programme.desc: After an unusual encounter, a talented chef and a recently divorcee fall in love and build the home and family they've always dreamed of, until a painful truth puts their love story to the test.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer
programme.desc: An intuitive but troubled police officer is recruited by an FBI expert to stop a relentless shooter who is terrorizing Baltimore.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil: Journey
programme.desc: Tracy and Nick agree to set aside work to make time for a long overdue honeymoon to Greece. When they are stranded on a secluded island, they confront their life choices.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The Turtles get into another battle with their enemy the Shredder, who has acquired new allies: the mutant thugs Bebop and Rocksteady and the alien being Krang.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil: Inspiration
programme.desc: Emma's life plan is thrown off course when Paolo must return to Italy to take care of his father and she discovers a new passion for making art accessible to all.

programme.title: Emergency Exit
programme.desc: It's a story about an unusual escape from school. At the first day of school, a schoolboy is crying and wants to go home, but the principal wouldn't allow him to go, so he decides to run away.

programme.title: Babysitter
programme.desc: In the midst of a messy divorce, Ray's clueless mom hires Anjelika, the eccentric daughter of a dead popstar to babysit his younger sister Stella. Anjelika gets along well with teenage Ray and even tries to help Ray win the affections of his crush, Sadie. Soon, Ray and Anjelika form a special bond, which threatens to jeopardize his mother's master plan to gain custody of Ray and Stella.

programme.title: Live: Commonwealth Games 360
programme.desc: Coverage from the day session on day one of the Games, which take place in Glasgow. The games first took place back in Hamilton, Canada in 1930 and took place again in 1934 and 1938, before being cancelled in 1942 and 1946 because of the Second World War. Since its return in 1950 the games have continued to take place every four years and are being held in Glasgow for the second time in 12 years,

programme.title: Didi & Friends Dream Jobs Ep01
programme.desc: Didi dan kawan-kawannya bertemu Prof Gogo yang memperkenalkan Kad Cita-Cita Impian. Apabila Jojo meletakkan kad angkasawan, mereka terus masuk ke dunia angkasa dan perlu menyelesaikan misi.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Dream Jobs Ep02
programme.desc: Dunia impian seterusnya membawa Didi dan kawan-kawannya ke sekolah sebagai pekerjaan cikgu. Nana sedar bahawa tugas cikgu bukan hanya mengajar, tetapi juga membantu murid yang dalam kesusahan.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Dream Jobs Ep03
programme.desc: Didi dan kawan-kawannya beraksi sebagai pasukan bola sepak menentang pasukan yang hebat. Namun Nana, Jojo dan Aera masih belum mahir, menyebabkan Didi nekad bertindak sendirian di padang.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep10
programme.desc: Portal ajaib muncul lalu menarik Nana dan Jojo ke dalam buku. Di sana, mereka bertemu Didi dan Bubu, seekor itik sedih yang melarikan diri kerana berbeza. Ketika mencari, sesuatu yang tak dijangka berlaku.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep11
programme.desc: Aera kembali bersatu dengan rakan-rakannya. Mereka bertemu Jack, yang dimarahi kerana menukar lembunya dengan kacang ajaib. Namun, apabila pohon kacang gergasi tumbuh, pengembaraan besar pun bermula.

programme.title: Super BOOMi S1 Ep04

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors is played sequentially.

programme.title: Bruce Lee
programme.desc: Bruce Lee and his friends get into a fight with the close aides of Ramdoss, an evil don. However, when the gangster kidnaps Lee's girlfriend, he plans to rescue her.

programme.title: Akhanda
programme.desc: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

programme.title: Latchiyam Oru Thayin Aasai
programme.desc: Left crippled by his disgruntled rival Anthony, Ganesha, a famous dancer, trains Raghava, a cleaning boy, to become a talented performer who later competes with Anthony's students.

programme.title: Biscoth
programme.desc: When Raja assumes control of his late father's company, he befriends Janaki, a woman whose stories mysteriously materialise in his reality.

programme.title: Kathar Basha Endra Muthuramalingam
programme.desc: Nana, a powerful gangster, vies for control over a village. However, Kathar, an honest man, strives for peace, resulting in a clash between the two.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Movie
programme.desc: When four lifelong friends receive three tickets from singer Paula Abdul to her concert, they compete in a series of pranks to decide which amongst them will attend the show.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
programme.desc: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: When his former superior, Colonel Samuel, asks him to join him on a special mission in Afghanistan, Rambo declines. However, when he is held hostage and tortured, Rambo decides to step in.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: This powerful story of human courage and reconciliation in the face of titanic forces of nature, pits the world's most famous monster against malevolent creatures that threaten man's very existence.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: A woman is transformed into a lethal post-human weapon after she is forced into a dark underworld deal. She uses her newfound abilities to take revenge on the criminal empire that enslaved her.

programme.title: Hellboy II: The Golden Army
programme.desc: An underworld prince ignites a war against humanity to conquer Earth. Consequently, Hellboy and his squad must prevent him from unlocking a lethal army.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Explorer Rick O'Connell and his family face Emperor Han, an ancient Chinese ruler resurrected by a rogue military faction in China via a mystical gemstone.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers an accident that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a barren island, a robot named Roz must rapidly adapt to the wild. It soon forms an unlikely parental bond with an orphaned gosling, finding connection in isolation.

programme.desc: 5 children accidentally found by a wealthy man who lost his wife and child in a car accident. They have different powers and only realize when they are teenagers. Their powers help them to solve cases.

programme.title: Live: Tour de France Men
programme.desc: Coverage from the 18th stage of the Grand Tour race, a 185.2km mountain route from Voiron to Orcieres-Merlette. Australia's Ben O'Connor won this stage last year as he claimed his one and only stage victory of the 2025 race, and his first since 2021. That success twelve months ago was the first stage win for a non-European rider at last year's race.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Atlanta Braves v San Diego Padres (Start-time 5.15pm). Coverage of the National League match from Truist Park. These two teams only met a month ago in a three-game series in San Diego, as the Padres won all three matches. The visitors won the first two games in tight affairs thanks to 1-0 and 7-6 victories, before they rounded off the series with a 5-2 win.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays v Tampa Bay Rays (Start-time 8.07pm). Coverage of the American League match from Rogers Centre. These two sides last faced each other back in May in a three-match series at this venue which was won 2-1 by the Rays. Tampa claimed the first two games thanks to 8-5 and 7-6 wins before the Blue Jays won the final match 5-3.

programme.title: Live: Tour de France Men
programme.desc: Coverage from the 19th stage of the Grand Tour race, a 127.9km mountain route from Gap to Alpe d'Huez. He finished clear of Denmark's Jonas Vingegaard and eventual winner of the 2025 yellow jersey Tadej Pogacar.

programme.title: Live: LIV Golf
programme.desc: Coverage from the second day of the 10th round of the season, which takes place at JCB Golf and Country Club in Rocester, Uttoxeter. programme.title: Kembar Sado
programme.desc: Filem ini mengisahkan tentang saudara kembar yang dibesarkan dua keluarga berlainan latar belakang. Seorang begitu jujur dan ikhlas manakala seorang lagi hilang arah tujuan hidup. Ikuti cerita mereka.

programme.title: Bisik Pada Langit
programme.desc: Kisah Wak Selamat yang berkeras untuk melalawat Siti Hajar anak perempuan kesayangannya yang nazak di Australia akibat kemalangan motor. Lakonan Jalil Hamid, Ummi Nazeera, Beto Kushairy, Erwin Dawson, Naim Daniel.

programme.title: Jejak Warriors
programme.desc: Apabila Wan Raja mendapat tahu impian ayahnya tidak pernah terkabul, dia mengembara dari Johor Bahru ke Kota Bharu, berdepan dengan pelbagai rintangan untuk merealisasikan impian ayahnya.

programme.title: Walid Ep09
programme.desc: Walid kembali ke Jihad Ummah menuntut takhta, namun Ummi Hafizah melawan. Pertelingkahan tegang memicu keputusan yang mengubah takdir—apabila batas dilanggar, siapa akan bertahan di runtuhan empayar?

programme.title: Walid Ep10
programme.desc: Selepas rampasan kuasa, tatanan baharu terbentuk di Jihad Ummah. Habiburrahman mendakwa ketuhanan, memukau pengikut—namun janji penyelamatan menyembunyikan realiti yang lebih gelap.

programme.title: The Making of Polong
programme.desc: Maria Hadi bertaubat dari ilmu hitam sebelum mati. Tersilap mewariskan polong, makhluk itu membalas dendam dan menyumpah pewarisnya

programme.title: Senario The Movie Episod 2 Beach Boys
programme.desc: The Beach Boys - Azlee, Mazlan dan Wahid kembali untuk menyempurnakan misi mereka menyelamatkan sebuah resort yang hampir ditutup.

programme.title: Adiwira Ku
programme.desc: Berdasarkan dari kisah benar mengenai pasukan 'choral speaking' SMK Pinang Tunggal di Kedah yang mengharungi pelbagai kepayahan dan cabaran demi untuk memenangi pertandingan tersebut.

programme.title: Seandainya Kau Ada
programme.desc: Pasangan kekasih berpisah tatkala lelaki yang dikasihi pergi melanjutkan pelajaran. Dia berjanji akan mengahwini pasangannya bila dia kembali. Tetapi terhalang setelah dia temui perenpuan lain.

programme.title: Anakku Sazali
programme.desc: Kasih sayang akan menjadi racun hidup yang paling berbisa bila diberi secara berlebih-lebihan. Lakonan Allahyarham Tan Sri P.Ramlee dan Allahyarham Nordin Ahmad.

programme.title: Sultan Mahmood Mangkat Dijulang
programme.desc: Seorang pembesar istana tidak berpuas hati dengan perkahwinan Dang Anum sanggup melakukan fitnah hingga Dang Anum mati dibunuh Sultan.

programme.title: Good Boys Go To Heaven Ep09
programme.desc: The retelling of Good Boys Go to Heaven, recounting the chronology of Ahyan's murder.

programme.title: Gerak Khas The Movie 3
programme.desc: Unit Gerak Khas cuba menyelesaikan kes pembunuhan Suzana dan Inspektor Aleza, Haris dan Farah yang baru sebulan dipindahkan ke unit berkenaan ditugaskan menyiasat kes itu.

programme.title: Cupcake Mama
programme.desc: Mengisahkan Hanna, isteri dan ibu yang bosan dengan rutin hidup. Dorongan keluarga membawa dia memulakan perniagaan cupcake dari rumah, sambil mengimbangi peranan sebagai isteri, ibu dan usahawan.

programme.title: Cerai
programme.desc: Pengalaman berkurung dengan pasangan selama musim PKP memaksa dua pasangan suami isteri menilai semula perkahwinan mereka yang telah disalah ertikan selama ini.

programme.title: Good Boys Go To Heaven Ep10
programme.desc: Featuring exclusive behind-the-scenes footage and candid interviews, this episode captures the cast and crew's experiences, challenges, and reflections on bringing the series to life.

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih Ep08

programme.title: Citra Exclusive: Komplot
programme.desc: Apabila anak saudaranya diculik, Zali cuba untuk membantu namun dia mula mengesyaki ada sesuatu yang tidak kena mengenai kes penculikan tersebut...

programme.title: Citra Exclusive: Mat So'od
programme.desc: Mat So'od merupakan penglipurlara di kampungnya. Namun berlawanan dengan kerjayanya, Mat So'od merupakan seorang pemurung hampir sepanjang hidupnya.

programme.title: Tuah
programme.desc: Hang Tuah yang telah hilang kerana mengembara ke masa hadapan pulang semula ke zaman asalnya untuk menyekat tindakan Hang Jebat dari menderhaka dan membunuh Sultan Melaka.

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih Ep06

programme.desc: Atlanta Braves v San Diego Padres (Start-time 5.15pm). Coverage of the National League match from Truist Park. programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: The 1998/99 UEFA Champions League final between Manchester United and Bayern Munich at the Nou Camp. Victory for United would clinch an historic treble.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: A look back at the 1999/00 UEFA Champions League final between Real Madrid and Valencia in Paris. Steve McManaman, signed from Liverpool the previous summer, featured for Madrid.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the dramatic 2001 final between Bayern Munich and Valencia in Milan. Bayern, chasing their first title in a quarter-century, featured a 20-year-old Owen Hargreaves.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: The 2001/02 UEFA Champions League final saw a star-studded Real Madrid face Bayer Leverkusen in Glasgow. The match featured arguably the greatest goal in the competition's history.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003 final between Serie A rivals Juventus and AC Milan at Old Trafford. Paolo Maldini was aiming to lift the trophy as captain, just as his father had done in 1963.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003/04 UEFA Champions League final between Monaco and Porto in Gelsenkirchen. Jose Mourinho would leave Porto to take over at Chelsea just days later.

England's Tyrrell Hatton won the last event in Andalucia, Spain, to claim his first victory of the 2026 season at the ninth time of asking.
